  "title": "Strategy Call with Brendan",
  "meetingLocationType": "default",

  "toNotify": true,
  "ignoreFreeSlotValidation": false
}

call.transcript:
Agent: Hey! What brings you to the call today?
User: Hey. I want to book an appointment
Agent: Perfect! What day and time work best for you?
User: check for tomorrow around three PM.
Agent: What's your timezone or what city are you in?
User: No. I'm in Indian time, you know.
Agent: Got it, Indian Standard Time. What's the best email for the confirmation?
User: Yes. H e r s h at a g r a w e l h a r s h dot com.
Agent: Just to confirm, that's hersh at agrawalharsh dot com — did I get that right?
User: Yeah. That is correct.
Agent: What's your first name?
User: Why?
Agent: I need to create your contact in our system since I don't have you on file yet. What's your first name?
User: One second.
User: Okay. Can you again check my email ID?
User: I think I'm already in did you they do heard it right. Right? It's h e, not h e.
Agent: Ah, let me get the correct spelling. Can you spell out your email again for me?
User: Yes. H a r s h at a g r a w a l h a r s h dot com.
Agent: Just to confirm, that's harsh at agrawalharsh dot com — did I get that right?
User: Yeah. That is right.
Agent: Let 
Agent: me check the available slots for you. This should just take a few sec, don't worry.
Agent: I don't have any available slots for tomorrow. How about Tuesday, September 9th instead?
User: Can I just say for next week around the two PM?
Agent: Let 
Agent: me check the available slots for you. This should just take a few sec, don't worry.
Agent: I have a few slots available for Tuesday, September 9th. I have 3:30 PM and 9:30 PM available. Do either 
User: Okay. 
Agent: work for you?
User: We'll go with the three thirty PM.
Agent: Thank 
Agent: you for your patience while I finalize your appointment booking. This should only take a moment.
User: What the heck?
Agent: You're all set! I've scheduled your call for Tuesday, September 9th at 3:30 PM Indian time. Anything else I can help with today?
User: Can you make sure you have done it right? I think
User: I need the booking.
Agent: Thank 
Agent: you for your patience while I gather the details of your booked appointments. This will only take a moment. If there's anything else you need or any questions you have, feel free to let me know!
User: Can you try again? Because my appointment hasn't been booked.
Agent: You're right, let me book that 
Agent: appointment for you again. 
Agent: Perfect! Your appointment is now confirmed for Tuesday, September 9th at 3:30 PM Indian time. You should receive a confirmation email shortly. Anything else I can help with today?
User: Let me check once.
Agent: Sure, go ahead and check. I'll wait here if you need anything else.
User: Please wait for one minute.
Agent: No problem, take your time.
Agent: Still there? Just checking if everything looks good with your appointment confirmation.
User: Can I just wait, please?
Agent: Of course, take all the time you need. I'm here whenever you're ready.
Agent: Hey, just wanted to check if you're still there? Let me know if you need anything else or if you have questions about your appointment.
User: For what day did you book the appointment?
Agent: I booked your appointment for Tuesday, September 9th at 3:30 PM Indian time.
User: Is it possible if you can cancel this appointment?
Agent: Sure, I can cancel that for
